headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Match Group, Lowers Price Target to $30
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Alec Brondolo   maintains Match Group (NASDAQ:MTCH) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $33 to $30.
